items.prompt: A complete VIP package typically includes…
choices: agent, protocol checker, coverage, and docs/self-test
only a driver and a scoreboard
items.explain: Four handoff deliverables: agent + checker + coverage + docs.

items.prompt: Shipping only an agent usually means…
choices: you have a scaffold, not a complete VIP handoff
coverage and docs are automatically included

items.prompt: In VIP anatomy, the checker’s job is…
choices: compare expect vs actual payload in the env scoreboard

items.prompt: Docs (API notes, examples, self-test) are part of a VIP handoff, not optional decoration.
items.explain: Without docs/self-test, consumers cannot integrate reliably.
